blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
